differential_diagnoses: Monoclonal B-cell lymphocytosis or underlying lymphoproliferative disorder
next_steps: Surgical consultation for management of jejunal segments and fistula
Resection of involved jejunal segments for histopathologic evaluation
Flow cytometry and T-cell receptor gene rearrangement studies on resection specimen
Repeat immunoglobulin quantification and lymphocyte subset analysis
Infectious disease consultation to exclude opportunistic infections
Blood and stool cultures to assess for secondary infection
